options.description: Client ID for Spark Management authentication
options.help: Client ID for Quantum Spark Management authentication. To obtain: open the Quantum Spark Management portal → API Keys → New → New account API key → fill in details and click Create → copy the Client ID shown

options.description: Secret key for Spark Management authentication
options.help: Secret Key for Quantum Spark Management authentication. Generated alongside the Client ID — copy and store it securely at creation time as it will not be shown again

options.description: Authentication URL from the API key creation dialog
options.help: Paste the Authentication URL shown in the API key creation dialog (e.g. https://cloudinfra-gw.portal.checkpoint.com/auth/external). The path suffix is stripped automatically so you can copy it directly from the portal

options.description: Region for cloud infrastructure (EU, US, STG, LOCAL)
options.help: Alternative to --infinity-portal-url. Region code for your deployment: EU, US, STG, or LOCAL. Use this if you know your region and prefer not to copy the full authentication URL
